title: DeluxeMenus
description: The all in one GUI menu plugin!
body:
[![HelpChat Discord](https://helpch.at/banner.png)](https://helpch.at/discord) Development builds: [https://ci.extendedclip.com/job/DeluxeMenus/](https://ci.extendedclip.com/job/DeluxeMenus/) ![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/0qL4X8R.png) [![PlaceholderAPI Wiki](https://i.imgur.com/bctCjMk.png)](https://wiki.placeholderapi.com/users/placeholder-list/) [![DeluxeMenus Wiki](https://i.imgur.com/qVmPTAq.png)](https://wiki.helpch.at/clips-plugins/deluxemenus) [![HelpChat Discord](https://i.imgur.com/TeWFbZK.png)](https://helpch.at/discord) ![Divider](https://i.imgur.com/iIDqxVI.png)
**DeluxeMenus** is the all-in-one inventory GUI menu plugin! You can create GUI menus that open with custom commands that will show stats or perform actions specific to the player who opened it. Your menus are fully configurable. You can create menus that show specific items to different players, or perform different actions depending on what JavaScript requirement they have for a specific slot in a certain GUI. **Please Note:** - [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) must be installed for the plugin to correctly function. Click the placeholders button in the heading to see all the various placeholders you can use within the plugin. - **Java 11 or higher is required to use version 1.13.4 and above.**
![Usage Example](https://i.imgur.com/tIXljWL.png)
### Commands - **`/`** **Opens the menu for yourself** *Permissions are defined at will to use this.* - **`/dm open `** Opens the menu for yourself *`deluxemenus.open`* - **`/dm open `** Opens the menu for another player *`deluxemenus.open.others`* - **`/dm list`** Lists all menus you have access to *`deluxemenus.list`* - **`/dm reload`** Reloads the menus and settings *`deluxemenus.reload`* - **`/dm execute `** Perform an action on the target player *Restricted to OP/Console*
![Divider](https://i.imgur.com/l0Zm2G9.png)
The power of customization is in your hands with **DeluxeMenus**. You can create menus that are very simple (such as a server selector menu), or very complex menus such as a working hangman game. The possibilities are as far as your imagination takes you. You can learn how to configure and build menus [here](https://wiki.helpch.at/clips-plugins/deluxemenus).
![Info](https://i.imgur.com/vdempH8.png) This plugin utilizes bStats to collect anonymous statistics ![bStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/DeluxeMenus.svg) [https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/DeluxeMenus](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/DeluxeMenus)
